subject: First Aid & Safety
title: How 911 Works
description: A short lesson to help you apply How 911 Works.

hook.text: You dial 911 and a calm voice answers. Behind that voice sits a vast emergency network.

buildup.text: The dispatcher routes your call to police, fire, or EMS based on your description.

discovery.text: Modern systems can trace your cell phone location, but accuracy varies by area.

twist.text: Giving your exact address and staying on the line saves more time than anything else.

climax.text: Dispatchers also give real-time instructions—like how to do CPR—while help is en route.

punchline.text: 911 isn't just a phone call. It's a lifeline.

quiz.question: What should you do after calling 911?
options: Stay on the line and give your exact address
